description: Create a complete, valid Webots world file for a two-robot cooperative ball-pushing experiment. The world must include a WorldInfo node with a basicTimeStep of 32 and Earth-standard gravity (~ -9.81 m/s²), a Viewpoint positioned to see the entire arena, a 1.0 x 1.0 meter RectangleArena (or Floor), a TexturedBackground, and a light source. Add two E-puck robots: 'e-puck_1' at (-0.3, 0, 0) and 'e-puck_2' at (0.3, 0, 0), both facing the center. Place a Ball node at the center (0, 0, 0.04). Save the completed world file to /home/ga/Desktop/cooperative_push.wbt.
